title: hypericum rigidum subsp. bracteatum
intro: Hypericum rigidum subsp. bracteatum, also known as St John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of hypericin and hyperforin, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of St John's Wort include its potential to alleviate symptoms of mild to moderate depression, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. St John's Wort is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is typically taken in conjunction with other herbal remedies to enhance its effects.
